title: organization — settings
description: Tenant-facing preferences for the Organization module. One group (tenant scope). No per-user preferences — the user's default_organization_id lives on their profile in the user module, not here.

groups.label: Organizations
groups.description: Tenant-wide Organization behaviour preferences. Distinct from per-Organization branding (which lives on each row).

sections.label: Defaults
sections.description: Behaviour when the caller has not pinned a specific Organization.

fields.name: auto_resolve_default_on_missing_header
fields.label: Auto-resolve default organization
fields.helpText: When on, requests without an X-Organization-Id header fall back to the tenant's default org. When off, missing header is a hard 400 error.

fields.name: prompt_for_organization_on_login
fields.label: Ask users to pick an organization at login
fields.helpText: When on and the tenant has more than one Organization, the login flow shows a picker instead of routing to the default.

sections.label: Hierarchy
sections.description: Nesting behaviour for tenants on Enterprise tier.

fields.name: allow_reparent_after_create
fields.label: Allow moving organizations after create
fields.helpText: When off, parent_id becomes IMMUTABLE — an organization can only be created with a parent, never moved. Recommended for compliance-heavy tenants.

fields.name: max_hierarchy_depth
fields.label: Max nesting depth
fields.helpText: Hard cap on tree_depth. Existing rows deeper than the new cap remain until reparented.

sections.label: Branding cascade
sections.description: How Organizations without their own branding inherit from the tenant.

fields.name: cascade_branding_from_parent
fields.label: Inherit branding from parent organization
fields.helpText: When on, a child Organization without its own logo/colors inherits from its nearest ancestor. When off, the tenant-level branding is used directly.

fields.name: notify_admins_on_create
fields.label: Notify admins when a new organization is created

fields.name: notify_admins_on_reparent
fields.label: Notify admins when an organization is reparented

fields.name: notify_admins_on_default_change
fields.label: Notify admins when the default organization changes
fields.helpText: Cannot be turned off — default-changes are transactional (they shift every downstream default-org filter).
